forest-ink.$description: Forest Ink — Primary text, heading strokes, and structural borders. A near-black with green undertone that grounds the warm cream surfaces in nature rather than corporate gray

parchment-cream.$description: Parchment Cream — Primary surface for buttons, soft callouts, and section tints. A warm cream with green undertone — the canvas color, not pure white

card-linen.$description: Card Linen — Card and elevated surface background. Slightly warmer and more beige than Parchment Cream, creating a paper-grain feel for nested elements

sage-charcoal.$description: Sage Charcoal — Dark elevated surface for hero feature blocks and inverse sections. A muted green-black that ties the dark theme back to the brand green

muted-moss.$description: Muted Moss — Secondary helper text, subdued labels, and low-emphasis icons. The bridge between Forest Ink and Sage Charcoal for non-primary copy

vivid-green.$description: Vivid Green — Primary action background, active nav state, live notification dots, and the hero brand accent. Vivid botanical green that reads as alive against the cream — this is the only color allowed to shout

deep-botanical.$description: Deep Botanical — Green accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

coral-blush.$description: Coral Blush — Red outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges

wine-plum.$description: Wine Plum — Red wash for highlight backgrounds, decorative bands, and soft emphasis behind content.

abc-favorit.$description: Primary typeface for all body, headings, links, and display text. The tight -0.02em tracking at display sizes and -0.01em at body is signature — it pulls letters into a dense, editorial rhythm. ABC Favorit is a custom neo-grotesque with humanist warmth; substitute with Inter at -0.02em letter-spacing if unavailable. Weight 400 for body and links, weight 500 for headings, subheadings, and emphasis. The 80px display size with 0.95 line-height creates a tight, almost poster-like headline presence.

geist-mono.$description: Metadata, labels, timestamps, and code-like micro-copy. Set at 13px with 0.015em positive tracking and stylistic alternates ss02/ss06 enabled — the slightly wider mono and feature settings give labels a quiet technical authority that contrasts Favorit's editorial warmth. Substitute with JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono.

system-sans-serif.$description: Small UI chrome — icon-adjacent labels and 12px utility text in dense product surfaces. A system fallback that lets the UI degrade gracefully where custom fonts aren't loaded.

page-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Outermost page background — pure white lets the warm cream cards pop forward.

parchment-cream.$description: Surface level 1: Primary warm surface for hero bands, button fills, and section tints.

card-linen.$description: Surface level 2: Nested card background — slightly more beige to create paper-grain depth.

sage-charcoal.$description: Surface level 3: Dark elevated surface for inverse feature blocks and dark product UI containers.
